data.name: 软件中间件与系统集成（Software & Integration）
2015 전기공학의 날 전시 안내원으로서의 사회적 인간형 로봇 Lumen의 컴퓨팅 플랫폼 설계 및 구현

data.description: Selection and adaptation of middleware is part of Software & Integration.
Software & Integration has prerequisite Selection and adaptation of middleware.
Design and Implementation of Computational Platform for Social-Humanoid Robot Lumen as an Exhibition Guide in Electrical Engineering Days 2015 discusses Selection and adaptation of middleware.
